name: Burgundy the Magic Elf
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔法妖精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マジック・エルフ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バーガンディ
desc: If a card(s) is discarded from your opponent's hand by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each card discarded. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand. You can only use each effect of "Burgundy the Magic Elf" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a card(s) is discarded from your opponent's hand by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each card discarded. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand. You can only use each effect of "Burgundy the Magic Elf" once per turn.
eff: If a card(s) is discarded from your opponent's hand by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each card discarded. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand. You can only use each effect of "Burgundy the Magic Elf" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
